name: mb_fpindep
m5_band: CPI < faddchain CPI - 0.5 AND < 2.5 (FP throughput tput 1 hides latency)
note: FP latency-vs-throughput contrast (relation band vs mb_faddchain). The SAME fadd opcode is interleaved with two independent integer adds; the fadd's 3-cycle latency is overlapped by the U/V integer work, so the stream retires at fadd THROUGHPUT (1) not LATENCY (3) -> CPI~1.15, far below the dependent chain ~2.99. p5trace.so golden: icache_miss 1.95%, dcache 0, misalign 0.
